# libredash agent conversations

List agent conversations

## Usage

```sh
libredash agent conversations [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--json` | bool | `false` | print JSON response |
| `--limit` | int | `0` | maximum items to return |
| `--page-token` | string | `` | opaque page token |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
